description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark hip roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls and darker accents, with large windows on the front and side elevations providing ample natural light. A paved driveway leads to a parking area with a car, and a curved walkway connects the driveway to the main entrance. The house sits on a rectangular grassy plot, with a small porch supported by columns at the front. The rear of the house has a covered patio area, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The overall design is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, and a paved driveway on a grassy plot. The facade features clean lines, a small porch, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, porch with columns, and the driveway with a parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, side windows, and the solid wall with fewer openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio area, back windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway leading to the parking area, side balcony, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a small porch with columns, a single front door, and a paved walkway leading from the driveway.
